Protector.desc:
Give +1 DEF to one other party member or NPC. This bonus increases to +2 at level 3, and to +3 at level 5.
You may switch targets on your turn as part of an oracle action.

Martial Expertise.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: B

Unburdened.desc: Your dodge is not capped while wearing [Heavy] armor.

Honorable Reputation.desc: When making a check to persuade an NPC, lower the DC by 2 unless they hate knights.

Resilience.desc: Once per day, remain at 1hp after taking lethal damage.

Acquire.desc:
DC: ? + [target FNS].
Make a finesse check to steal an unequipped item from an enemy.
Acquire.dm_notes:
Base DCs are usually:
5 - unequipped items
7 - held items (level 3 or higher)
9 - equipped items (level 5)
Some items may be easier or harder to steal at your discretion

Trapwise.desc: Locate traps using RSN or SVY

Hide.desc:
*(you must use your oracle and move actions to use this in combat)*
You may hide on your turn. Opponents cannot target you while you are hidden. If you successfully attack while hidden, the damage bypasses your opponent's DEF, but you are no longer hidden.

Disarm.desc: You may use Acquire on an enemy's held items.

Slip.desc: On a successful FNS check, enemies cannot attack you for leaving the current zone until next turn

Disarmor.desc: You may use Acquire on an enemy's equipped gear.

Spellcraft.desc: You can analyze the properties of a spell or ritual with a RSN check.
Spellcraft.dm_notes:
Base DCs are usually:
 Rank - DC
X - 5
W - 7
X - 9
Y - 11
Z - 13
Some spells may be easier or harder to analyze at your discretion.

Decrease DC by 2 for each of the following:
 - Player witnessed spell being cast
 - Player has access to written record of the spell (tome, scroll, runes, magic circle, etc)
 - Player is directly affected by the spell

Arcane Basics.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: V

Arcane Knowledge.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: W

Distinguished.desc: When making a RSN check to persuade an NPC, lower the DC by 2 unless they distrust magic users.

Arcane Secrets.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: X

Knack.desc:
You may either:
 - Make a SVY check in place of another check.
 - Use your SVY save in place of another save.
Gain an additional use at level 3, and again at level 5. Regain all uses at the start of a combat encounter.

Weapon Forte.desc: At the start of the day, pick a weapon you own. Use SVY in place of that weapon's normal weapon stat.

Trapwise.desc: Locate traps using RSN or SVY

Martial Training.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: C

Arcane Basics.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: V

Martial Expertise.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: B

Arcane Knowledge.desc: You can equip gear and weapons with Rank: W
